data.title: Ark Invest Expands Global Market Innovation with Quantum Solutions Investment
data.description: According to PANews, Ark Invest's founder and CEO, Cathie Wood, announced on the X platform that the company has invested in Japan-based Ethereum treasury firm Quantum Solutions. This move aims to further expand innovative channels in global capital markets. Additionally, Quantum Solutions CEO Francis B. Zhou revealed plans to continue increasing their Ethereum holdings after acquiring 2,365 ETH.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose at the close of US stocks, with ALTS rising 11.29%
data.description: According to data from msx.com, US stocks closed Thursday with a preliminary gain of 0.3% for the Dow Jones Industrial Average, 0.58% for the S&P 500, and 0.89% for the Nasdaq. Crypto stocks also saw gains, including ALTS (up 11.29%), RIOT (up 7.9%), BMNR (up 2.42%), MSTR (up 1.46%), and SBET (up 0.48%). msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: He Yi responds to CZ's pardon: Incredible, Binance will promote a broader cryptocurrency movement
data.description: Binance co-founder He Yi responded to CZ's pardon on the X platform. She said: "The news of CZ's pardon is incredible. Thank you to Trump for his leadership and commitment to making the United States the world's cryptocurrency capital. CZ's vision not only made Binance the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, but also will promote the broader cryptocurrency movement. If you are full of light in your heart, the light will shine on you."

data.title: Ethereum ACDE 223rd meeting confirms Fusaka upgrade schedule, BPO1 advanced to December 9
data.description: Ethereum developers discussed several key topics at All Core Devs-Execution (ACDE) meeting #223 on October 23rd. The meeting confirmed that the Fusaka testnet was progressing smoothly, with 99% participation from all client teams. Following a request from @ralexstokes, the development team moved Fusaka BPO1 forward from its original December 17th to December 9th. Meanwhile, an update from the Glamsterdam devnet revealed that BAL is now running locally, with the BAL devnet launch expected tomorrow. The meeting also discussed best practices for improving gas accuracy, with a dedicated breakout session planned for next Wednesday.

data.title: Ethereum Developers Advance Fusaka Testnet and Discuss Gas Precision
data.description: According to Foresight News, Christine Kim, Vice President of Research at Galaxy, provided a summary of the 223rd Ethereum Execution Layer Core Developers Meeting (ACDE). The meeting focused on several key topics, including the successful progress of the Fusaka testnet, which has achieved a 99% participation rate with all client teams involved. The development team has decided to move the Fusaka BPO1 date forward from December 17 to December 9. Additionally, updates from the Glamsterdam development network indicate that BAL is currently running locally, with plans to launch the BAL development network tomorrow. The meeting also addressed the best methods to improve gas precision, with a dedicated group discussion scheduled for next Wednesday.

data.title: Australia's Central Bank Outlines Key Priorities for Modernizing Payment Systems
data.description:
According to PANews, Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) Governor Michele Bullock has outlined four major priorities to modernize the nation's payment systems, emphasizing the balance between innovation and security. Bullock stated that the primary focus is on upgrading Australia's interbank payment infrastructure to replace the aging Bulk Electronic Clearing System (BECS). The goal is to implement a plan by mid-2026 to enable real-time, 24/7 payments with enhanced data support.

Additionally, the RBA is collaborating with industry partners to improve cross-border payment efficiency, reduce costs, and increase transparency. The third priority involves investing in fraud prevention and upgrading encryption to quantum-safe standards, with plans to migrate card systems to the AES quantum-safe protocol. Lastly, the RBA aims to strengthen operational resilience to ensure stability in the payment network amid the development of digital currencies and central bank digital currencies (CBDCs).

Bullock added that despite the widespread adoption of digital payments, the RBA remains committed to maintaining cash circulation. The bank is working with major banks and regulatory bodies to explore new cash distribution models to ensure long-term sustainability.

data.title: Nevada Regulators Issue Cease and Desist Order to Crypto Custodian
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Nevada regulators have issued a cease and desist order to the cryptocurrency custodian company Fortress Trust, now known as Elemental Financial Technologies Inc., on October 22. Court documents reveal that the company is on the brink of bankruptcy, facing a significant mismatch between its assets and liabilities. The regulators highlighted in their order that Fortress's liquidity is severely inadequate to meet its obligations to clients.

data.title: Guojin Securities: Overseas crypto mining farms are transforming into AI computing centers
data.description: A Guojin Securities research report indicates that crypto mining companies, with their low electricity prices and large approved power quotas, have become new entrants into the AI ​​data center market. Currently, most crypto mining companies are preparing to transition to AI data centers, but their strategies and progress vary. We recommend focusing on companies that are more aggressive in their AI data center transformation, have clear AI computing capacity expansion plans and power guarantees, and whose combined market value of holdings, stock holdings, and current contract value are trading at a discount to their current stock price. (Jinshi)

data.title: A dormant Bitcoin wallet that had been dormant for 14.4 years transferred 150 BTC worth $16.56 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a Bitcoin wallet from the Satoshi era containing 4,000 BTC (worth $440.4 million) transferred 150 BTC (worth $16.56 million) to a new wallet after 14.4 years of inactivity. Furthermore, the whale had been selling BTC through another wallet, which also received 4,050 BTC directly from the current wallet.

data.title: DeFi perps volume explodes past $1T in a record month so far
data.description:
Hyperliquid, Aster, and Lighter have pushed decentralized perps trading volume to over $1 trillion in October, beating August’s tally with a week to spare.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/decentralized-perps-1-trillion-volume-october?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: "10.11 till now 100% winning rate whale" has achieved 12 consecutive wins, with a cumulative profit of 12.634 million US dollars
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the "100% Win Rate Whale" (0xc2a...E5f2) has once again closed its positions with profits, extending its winning streak since October 14th to 12, with a cumulative profit of $12.634 million. At 1:45 AM this morning, the announcement of a Thursday meeting between the Chinese and US heads of state was made. Following this, BTC briefly broke through $111,000. The whale closed its long positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL, pocketing a total profit of $1.774 million: $1.271 million in BTC, $357,000 in ETH, and $146,000 in SOL. At 7:00 AM, the whale once again opened a 5x leveraged long position in ETH, holding 7,375.45 ETH, valued at $28.42 million.

data.title: Meteora airdropped a total of $5.4 million in MET tokens to wallets related to the Trumps
data.description: The Meteora project conducted a token airdrop on Thursday, but two wallets associated with the Melania Trump meme coin received a total of approximately $1.2 million in MET tokens. According to SolScan data, wallets marked "melania-liquidity1.sol" and "melania-liquidity2.sol" received $784,200 and $454,724 in MET tokens, respectively, and these wallets subsequently transferred the funds to other addresses. In addition, three wallets associated with the President Trump meme coin also received a total of $4.2 million in MET tokens airdropped, and these addresses subsequently deposited the tokens on the OKX exchange. (Decrypt)

data.title: Yi He Responds to CZ’s Pardon: Binance Will Continue Building a Secure, Transparent, and User-First Platform
data.description: Binance co-founder Yi He shared on X that the news of CZ’s pardon was truly uplifting.「Incredible news of CZ’s pardon today. Thank you, President Trump for your leadership and your commitment to making the U.S. the crypto capital of the world. CZ’s vision not only made Binance the world’s largest crypto exchange but also shaped the broader crypto movement. Binance remains focused on building a secure, transparent, and user-first platform that lowers fees and increases access to the financial system for everyone.」

data.title: Gold Prices Experience Significant Drop Amid Global Market Shifts
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Huatai Securities reported that on October 21, international gold prices experienced their largest single-day drop in 12 years, falling by 5.3%. This decline was primarily driven by a significant reduction in risk-averse sentiment due to multiple factors. Despite this short-term decrease, gold remains a suitable asset for risk aversion during the ongoing global restructuring period. The recent price drop is seen as an opportunity to increase holdings, and it is advised to refocus on gold once stability returns.

On October 22, the stock prices of typical gold companies fell less than the gold price itself, indicating that the market's consensus on the long-term value of gold-related assets remains unchanged. Gold prices are still within a long-term upward trend, and many gold companies are expected to achieve both volume and price increases by 2026. The current valuation levels are gradually becoming attractive for increased allocation, and it is recommended to buy on dips, focusing on leading companies with growth potential and resource advantages.

data.description:
USA crypto market bill nears finalization; Coinbase CEO sees bipartisan momentum despite government shutdown.

data.title: US bank reserves fall, providing basis for the Fed to end QT
data.description: U.S. banking system reserves, a key factor in the Federal Reserve's decision to continue shrinking its balance sheet, fell by approximately $59 billion to $2.93 trillion in the week ending October 22, according to data released by the Fed on Thursday. This was the lowest level since the week of January 1. The U.S. Treasury increased debt issuance to rebuild its cash balance following the July debt ceiling increase, which drained liquidity from other liabilities on the Fed's books, such as its overnight reverse repurchase agreement (ORA) facility and bank reserves. With the so-called ON-RRP (overnight reverse repurchase agreement) facility nearly empty, commercial bank reserves held at the Fed have been declining. Strategists at JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, TD Securities, and Wrightson all expect the Fed to stop shrinking its approximately $6.6 trillion balance sheet this month. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum Developers Set Deadlines for Upcoming Glamsterdam Upgrade
data.description:
According to PANews, the 223rd Ethereum Execution Layer Core Developers Meeting (ACDE) outlined key deadlines for the upcoming Glamsterdam upgrade. Developers have set October 30 as the deadline for submitting EIP proposals, with the final scope of code changes to be confirmed by November 27.

A significant focus of the meeting was the Fusaka mainnet timeline. Ethereum Foundation coordinator Alex Stokes proposed December 3, 2025, for the Fusaka mainnet upgrade, with subsequent Blob Parameter Optimization (BPO) scheduled for December 9 and January 7, 2026. All execution layer client teams, including Geth, Nethermind, Reth, Besu, and Erigon, agreed on the feasibility of this timeline.

The Hoodi testnet is set to activate the Fusaka version on October 28, marking the final test upgrade before the mainnet launch. Meanwhile, the Holesky testnet is expected to close next week.

For the Glamsterdam upgrade, developers plan to launch a multi-client developer testnet to test the Block Access Lists (BALs) feature. Key deadlines include proposal submission by October 30, client team feedback by November 6, and final scope confirmation by November 27. The Ethereum Cat Herders team will hold open office hours on October 28 to assist EIP authors with proposal submissions.

In technical discussions, EF researcher Maria Silva presented two options to enhance Gas unit precision, with plans to convert related research into EIPs for consideration in the Glamsterdam upgrade. Additionally, EIP 8058 proposes a "deduplication discount" for developers deploying the same contract multiple times to reduce state bloat.

Proposals EIP 7667 and EIP 6873, both related to Verkle data structures, have been removed from consideration as they no longer align with the current roadmap.

Stokes emphasized that the core objective is to finalize the technical scope of Glamsterdam by the end of November, laying the groundwork for the mainnet upgrade by the end of the year.

data.title: Trump: CZ is innocent and is being persecuted by the Biden administration
data.description: According to market news, Trump said that he pardoned Binance founder Zhao Changpeng because he was "innocent" and "persecuted by the Biden administration."

data.title: The US September CPI report will be released today, but it may not shake the expectation of interest rate cuts
data.description: While today's release of the US September CPI report may show stubbornly persistent inflation, investors may overlook this sign as money markets prepare for a Federal Reserve rate cut next week. Emily, founding partner of Bowersock Capital Partners, believes Friday's CPI is important given the government shutdown, as it's one of the few economic data releases we'll see. "However, since the Fed is likely to focus more on the labor market, we don't expect Friday's CPI to have much of an impact on the Fed's decision next week," she said. "We're likely to see two rate cuts this year, in October and December."

data.title: Coinbase to List aPriori (APR) and Meteora (MET)
data.description: According to official news, Coinbase will launch spot trading of aPriori (APR) and Meteora (MET). If liquidity conditions are met, APR-USD and MET-USD trading pairs will be open in supported regions later today.
